name: TaskUs, Inc.
business: TaskUs delivers outsourced digital services including Digital Customer Experience, Trust & Safety, and Artificial Intelligence Services. As of December 31, 2025, it supported approximately 200 clients across industries such as social media, e-commerce, gaming, financial services, and healthcare.

exposures.sentence: We deliver outsourced digital services that power the companies shaping the future within AI, autonomous vehicles, robotics, social media, financial services, healthcare, and beyond.

catalysts.sentence: Additionally, on February 25, 2026, the Board of Directors declared a special cash dividend of $3.65 per share, or approximately $333.0 million in the aggregate, payable on March 25, 2026.
